## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking fix)

## Testing

- [ ] `flutter test` passes (all existing + new tests)
- [ ] Manually tested on Android
- [ ] Manually tested on iOS
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
